name: Invoice Payee Extraction
description: Receives an xlsx spreadsheet upload + Google access token, extracts payee/account/IFSC from Drive invoice files via OpenRouter nvidia/nemotron-nano-12b-v2-vl:free, returns a filled xlsx file.
